canonical_answer: Golden-brown cookies with dark chocolate chips rest on a light surface. A pair of hands with light pink nails featuring black geometric lines holds one cookie. The hands gently pull the cookie apart to reveal a soft, yellow crumb interior. Loose chocolate chips are scattered nearby on the surface.
